---
title: "Cost-Effectiveness and Decision Modeling using R"
subtitle: "Oslo, June 2026"
---

::: {.hero}
Welcome! This website is the official home for all information related to the Cost-Effectiveness and Decision Modeling workshop. This site contains all the information you’ll need to get the most out of this workshop, including software, R packages, and additional resources.
:::

## Workshop dates and location

In-person sessions will be taking place on the following dates from 10am-4pm GMT+2 (Oslo time):

- **June 25, 2026:** Decision trees and Markov models
- **June 26, 2026:** Microsimulation modeling
- **June 27, 2026:** Sensitivity analysis

The course will use Auditorium 2 on Floor 1 of the University of Oslo's main library building called Georg Sverdrups Hus. The address is: Moltke Moes vei 39, 0851 Oslo. Please click here for a link (available in Norwegian and English) to see a map of the building and transportation instructions: https://www.uio.no/english/about/getting-around/areas/blindern/bl27/index.html

## Expected workload

On workshop days, participants will spend approximately **5-6 hours in live interactive sessions**. We recommend investing an additional **2-4 hours per day** to review material and complete exercises.

## Suggested daily schedule

- Preparation modules with video lectures: **1-2 hours**
- Live interactive sessions with code demonstrations and coding exercises: **5-6 hours**
- Completion of coding assignments: **1-2 hours**

## Communication

Slack will be our main platform for communication for participants and instructors for this workshop. On course days instructors will be quicker to respond on Slack than email. Please join Slack here: https://darth-oslo2026.slack.com

Prior to the course, if you have questions about preparation, installation, or access to materials, you can contact Petros and Alex:
- `petros.pechlivanoglou@sickkids.ca`
- `alexandra.moskalewicz@sickkids.ca`

## What do I need to do before the workshop?

- Complete the Intro to R module: https://intro-to-r-mod.netlify.app/
- Complete our Google Form so we can learn more about you: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc75SFT2TNL-xOU06_QeLgTGqW1_4yWYTlfXb2kLslfVBvBxA/viewform
- Join the Slack channel and introduce yourself: https://darth-oslo2026.slack.com
- Familiarize yourself with this course website and locate the preparation modules
